en-US.name: MCQuest
en-US.subtitle: MCQ practice for exam success
en-US.shortDescription: Practice exam-style multiple-choice questions for IGCSE, A-Level, IB, and AP.
en-US.fullDescription:
MCQuest is the fastest way to drill multiple-choice questions across the world's leading international curricula — IGCSE, AS/A2, IB, and AP.

Built for serious learners:
• Exam-style originals written by experienced teachers and examiners
• Wrong-only retry mode — focus time where it matters most
• Timed exam mode with realistic pressure
• Gamified streaks, XP, and unlockable badges to keep motivation high
• Detailed per-option rationales so you understand why, not just what
• Subjects: Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Economics, and more

Free tier: 10 questions per day. Go Pro for unlimited practice.

No ads. No data sold. Built by educators.

screenshots.note: Place 6.7-inch (iPhone 16 Pro Max) and 12.9-inch (iPad) screenshots in assets/screenshots/ios/ and assets/screenshots/android/. Required sizes documented at https://developer.apple.com/help/app-store-connect/reference/screenshot-specifications
